  Diagnostics: [
    {
      Id: DBVO006,
      Severity: Info,
      Message: The property 'Name' has [SequenceEquality] but does not implement IEnumerable. Consider using [IncludeInEquality] instead.,
      Location: (9,19)
    },
    {
      Id: DBVO006,
      Severity: Info,
      Message: The property 'Count' has [SequenceEquality] but does not implement IEnumerable. Consider using [IncludeInEquality] instead.,
      Location: (12,16)
    }
  ],
  GeneratedSources: [
    {
      HintName: Product.g.cs,
      Content:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestNamespace
{
    partial class Product
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Determines whether this Product is equal to another based on their values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override bool EqualsCore(Product other)
        {
            if (!SequenceEquals(Count, other.Count, true)) return false;
            if (!SequenceEquals(Name, other.Name, true)) return false;
            return true;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a hash code for this value object's values.
        /// </summary>
        protected override int GetHashCodeCore()
        {
            var hashCode = new HashCode();

            if (Count != null)
            {
                foreach (var item in Count)
                    hashCode.Add(item);
            }
            if (Name != null)
            {
                foreach (var item in Name)
                    hashCode.Add(item);
            }

            return hashCode.ToHashCode();
        }

        private static bool SequenceEquals<T>(IEnumerable<T>? first, IEnumerable<T>? second, bool orderMatters)
        {
            if (ReferenceEquals(first, second)) return true;
            if (first is null || second is null) return false;

            return orderMatters
                ? first.SequenceEqual(second)
                : first.OrderBy(x => x).SequenceEqual(second.OrderBy(x => x));
        }

    }
}

    }
  ]
}
